message:
chore: remove emoji PR title verifier workflow (#3241)

The verify/verify check requiring emoji prefixes on PR titles adds no
value and blocks merges unnecessarily. Remove it.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,14 +0,0 @@
-name: "PR Title Verifier"
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  verify:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verify-title.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
